description_long: This is a tall, freestanding display cabinet with a modern design, featuring a combination of wood and glass materials. The upper section consists of transparent glass panels on three sides, supported by a dark metal frame, and contains multiple glass shelves for displaying items. The lower section is made of wood with two opaque doors, likely concealing additional storage space. The cabinet stands on four slender metal legs, elevating it above the ground and giving it a light, airy appearance. The handles on the lower doors are minimalistic, blending seamlessly with the overall design. This piece is suitable for urban interiors such as cafes, boutiques, or residential living spaces, where both display and storage are needed.
description: A tall, modern display cabinet with glass-paneled upper shelves and a wooden lower storage section, standing on slim metal legs. It combines transparent and opaque materials for both display and concealed storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glass display area above and two wooden doors below, with visible handles and metal legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved glass panels and the depth of the cabinet, with the wood and glass materials clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a solid wooden back panel and the lower wooden section, with no glass or handles visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the curved glass and wood construction.
